reason: The image depicts a man dressed as a Roman Emperor (likely Valentinian III), standing in what appears to be a Roman forum.  He is wearing a crown and imperial garments. The surrounding architecture generally resembles Roman buildings. However, some of the background buildings and the modern appearance of the individuals in the crowd raise concerns about complete historical accuracy. The crowd's attire seems somewhat anachronistic, appearing modern and diverse, instead of the more uniform appearance one would expect in the 5th century. The emperor attire is acceptable.
